title: Pan-Seared Croation Mushrooms with French Butter
description: A simple, flavorful dish showcasing the rich taste of Croatian mushrooms. This recipe is a French-inspired take on a classic
instructions: Heat the French butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the Croatian mushrooms and stir occasionally until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Stir in the buttery and continue cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the pan-seared mushrooms hot, garnished with additional French butter if desired.
